message:
deps(cass): bump asupersync 2028c111→310ff61f and frankensearch 50e46f85→486eb2bb

Roll both pinned-rev dependencies forward in lockstep:

- `asupersync` 2028c111 → 310ff61f
- `frankensearch` 50e46f85 → 486eb2bb

Cargo.toml, Cargo.lock, and build.rs's `CONTRACTS` table are all updated
together — the build.rs dependency-contract check fails the build if
Cargo.toml diverges from the expected rev, so all three must move at
once.

README.md's "Pinned Dependency Revisions" table is synced to match.
Other pins (frankensqlite/fsqlite-types aed640a2, franken-agent-detection
88756ba9, frankentui 2d25a03d, toon/tru 5669b72a) are unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
